purpose: Top-level Code Explorer layout. Composes WorkspaceTabs + (FileExplorer | SearchPanel) + draggable divider + EditorTabs + DebugToolbar + CodeEditor + DebugPanels (right sidebar) + BottomPanel (Terminal/Output/Problems/Debug Console/Ports). Owns the resizable explorer-panel width state (180-500px, default 250). Bridges debug IPC: subscribes to push events 'debug-paused' (sets session, callStack, scopes; flushes nested variables for each scope), 'debug-resumed' (status running, clears pausedFile/Line), 'debug-stopped' (DEBUG_CLEAR_SESSION). Wires DebugToolbar callbacks to window.electronAPI.debug{Launch,Continue,Pause,StepOver,StepInto,StepOut,Stop} and implements Restart as stop-then-relaunch with a 300ms timeout (using debugLaunchConfigRef to remember script/cwd across the stop). Wires DebugPanels' onNavigateToFrame/onNavigateToBreakpoint to dispatch IDE_OPEN_FILE + ideNavigateToLine — same flow used by ProblemsPanel via BottomPanel's onNavigate prop. Registers Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+F global keydown to switch to search sidebar and focus '.ide-search-input'. Syncs currentDashboardId to active workspace's dashboard via getWorkspaceDashboard(ideActiveWorkspaceId). Mounts IDEWelcome (with embedded BottomPanel) when ideWorkspaces.length === 0.
gotchas: Comment in source: 'Workspace-dashboard creation is handled exclusively by WorkspaceTabs.jsx' — IDEView MUST NOT call createWorkspaceDashboard or you'll get duplicate dashboards.
Restart logic uses setTimeout(300ms) after debugStop().then() — empirical delay for V8 inspector teardown; reducing it causes 'address in use' errors.

Two file-tree-loading paths exist: this component's effect calls window.electronAPI.ideReadDir (note: ReadDir not ListDir!) when no cached tree, while FileExplorer.jsx calls window.electronAPI.ideListDir. Two different IPC methods producing different shapes — both must be kept in sync.

debug-paused handler iterates data.scopes and dispatches DEBUG_SET_VARIABLES for each scope.variables — assumes the IPC payload nests variables inside scopes (not all DAP backends do this; Synapse's DebugService does).
Cmd+Shift+F handler uses setTimeout(50) before focusing '.ide-search-input' — without it, the SearchPanel hasn't mounted yet.
ResizeObserver-style divider drag uses document-level mousemove/mouseup + body class 'ide-dragging' for cursor — must clean up on unmount or you'll have ghost listeners.
When no workspaces exist, IDEWelcome is mounted alongside BottomPanel — bottom panel is ALWAYS shown.
patterns: Multi-effect debug IPC subscription pattern: an array of cleanup functions accumulated then iterated on unmount.
Draggable divider via mousedown→document mousemove/mouseup with ref-stored startX/startWidth.
Conditional rendering of DebugToolbar + DebugPanels only when debugSession.status !== 'idle' — they appear/disappear with the session.
Embedded BottomPanel (`embedded` prop) in both welcome and main layouts.
conventions: Constants MIN_/MAX_/DEFAULT_EXPLORER_WIDTH at top of file.
